# RondoFlow

> RondoFlow is a local-first, open-source visual orchestration platform for building and running
> multi-agent Claude Code workflows on a drag-and-drop canvas. Connect agents, skills, security
> policies, and resources, then execute multi-agent runs entirely on your own machine.

RondoFlow is MIT-licensed and runs locally: a Next.js canvas UI talks to a Fastify backend that
spawns the Claude Code CLI against your own files and tools. Your code, prompts, and keys never
leave your machine. Agents can also run on OpenAI and Perplexity, so it is partly model-agnostic.
A Planner tunes a workflow before the run, a Director steers each step during the run, and an
Advisor reviews the result afterward. Use this file to find the canonical pages.

## Pages

- [RondoFlow home](https://rondoflow.app/): what it is, capabilities, install, catalog, FAQ
- [Compare](https://rondoflow.app/compare/): RondoFlow vs Langflow, Flowise, Hiveflow.ai, Relay.app
- [Documentation](https://docs.rondoflow.app): setup, canvas, workflows, policies, API reference
- [Source on GitHub](https://github.com/rondoflow/rondoflow): MIT-licensed repository

## Optional
